author: semernyakov
description: PolyMind: One Vault. Any Model. Infinite Evolution. Multimodal AI chat with Groq API — one-click model switching, history, and cross-device sync for seamless productivity. OpenAI and Claude support coming soon. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ivan Semernyakov
manifest.description: PolyMind: One Vault. Any Model. Infinite Evolution. Multimodal AI chat with Groq API — one-click model switching, history, and cross-device sync for seamless productivity. OpenAI and Claude support coming soon.
manifest.name: PolyMind

name: PolyMind

releases.author: semernyakov
releases.description:
**Bug Fixes**

- ESLint Warnings: Fixed all ESLint warnings for unused variables by prefixing them with underscore in function type definitions
- TypeScript Type Issues: Fixed type casting issues in ModelInfoDialog.tsx by properly casting model IDs to string
- Enum Value: Restored LLAMA3_70B enum value that was incorrectly removed in a previous commit (it's actively used in ChatPanel.tsx and types/models.ts)

**Documentation**

- Updated CHANGELOG.md with version 1.3.6 entry (English)
- Updated docs/CHANGELOG.ru.md with version 1.3.6 entry (Russian)

**Configuration**

- Updated version to 1.3.6 in package.json
- Updated version to 1.3.6 in manifest.json
- Updated version to 1.3.6 in versions.json
- Updated version to 1.3.6 in community-plugins.json

**Build**

- Production build successfully created for Obsidian
- All TypeScript type checks passing
- ESLint warnings resolved
releases.name: PolyMind 1.3.6
